zh.lifeSummary: 當John Greag於1626年10月1日出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安卡農蓋特時，他的父親James Greig19歲，母親Heleine Tennant24歲。他於1646年6月2日與Jeane Lawsoune在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安拉斯瓦德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Greag
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Grier  , itself a variant of   Gregory  .

variants.name: Grier
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): from the medieval Scottish personal name Grier, a vernacular form of Gregor (see Gregory ). This form of the surname is also common in Ireland, especially Donegal, Antrim, and Longford.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Greag was born on 1 October 1626, in Canongate, Midlothian, Scotland, his father, James Greig, was 19 and his mother, Heleine Tennant, was 24. He married Jeane Lawsoune on 2 June 1646, in Lasswade, Midlothian, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Greag est né le 1 octobre 1626, à Canongate, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, James Greig, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Heleine Tennant, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Jeane Lawsoune le 2 juin 1646, à Lasswade, Midlothian, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles.

Lui sposato Jeane Lawsoune il 2 giugno 1646, nel Lasswade, Midlothian, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: John Greagが1626年10月1日にスコットランドミドロスアンカノンガトで生まれた時，父James Greigは19歳，母Heleine Tennantは24歳であった。1646年6月2日にスコットランドミドロスアンラスワドでJeane Lawsouneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: John Greag(이)가 1626년 10월 1일 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 캔옹가트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Greig(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Heleine Tennant(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1646년 6월 2일 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 래스웨이드에서 Jeane Lawsoune(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Greag родился 1 октября 1626 г. в местности канонгэит, мидлотян, Шотландия, его отцу по имени James Greig было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Heleine Tennant, 24.
